name: skills-broker
description: Install-once shared broker runtime for routing skills and MCP capabilities across Claude Code and Codex.

scripts.build: node ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const file='dist/bin/skills-broker.js';const content=fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8');if(!content.startsWith('#!'))fs.writeFileSync(file,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+content);"
